functional_requirements.title: Real-Time Location-Based Offer Delivery
functional_requirements.description: The system must deliver offers to users in real time based on their current location and time of day when they enter a geofenced area during merchant offer hours

citation.source_reference: The app must deliver location-based offers to users in real time based on their current location and time of day

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Core capability of the platform. Priority Must-Have from explicit 'must' language. Combines FR1 and AC1 which describe the same capability.

functional_requirements.title: User Location Tracking Controls
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow users to control location tracking settings with options: always-on, app-open only, or off

citation.source_reference: The app must allow users to control location tracking settings (always-on, app-open only, or off)

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules

functional_requirements.reasoning: Privacy control capability. Must-Have from explicit 'must' language. Maps to AC2 and US2.

functional_requirements.description: The system must analyze user transaction history to personalize offer recommendations based on spending patterns

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria

functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to redeem offers instantly via a mobile interface at participating merchants, with the offer marked as redeemed and merchant receiving confirmation

functional_requirements.description: The system must support push notifications for relevant offers delivered within 2 seconds of a qualifying geofence event

citation.source_reference: The app must support push notifications for relevant offers

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules

functional_requirements.reasoning: Primary delivery channel for offers. Must-Have from explicit 'must' language. 2-second target from NFR Performance section.

functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to view their offer history including all redeemed and active offers with status and date

functional_requirements.title: Data Sharing Opt-Out and Account Deletion
functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to opt out of data sharing at any time (stopping collection of transaction and location data, disabling personalized offers) and request account/data deletion with completion within 30 days

citation.source_reference: The app must allow users to opt out of data sharing and delete their account/data

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Privacy and compliance capability. Must-Have from explicit 'must' language. Maps to US10, AC5, and AC10. 30-day deletion window from AC10.

functional_requirements.title: Report Expired or Invalid Offers
functional_requirements.description: Users should be able to report expired or invalid offers, receive confirmation of report submission, and have the offer flagged for review

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules

functional_requirements.reasoning: Quality control mechanism. Should-Have from explicit 'should' language. Maps to US8 and AC6.

functional_requirements.description: The system should limit offer notifications to one per offer per day per user, suppressing duplicate notifications when re-entering the same geofenced area

functional_requirements.description: Merchants should have access to a dashboard displaying campaign analytics including impressions, redemptions, and user engagement metrics

functional_requirements.title: Geofence Boundary Enforcement
functional_requirements.description: The system must not deliver offers to users when they are outside supported cities or geofenced areas

citation.source_reference: As a User, Not receive offers when outside supported cities, Prevents irrelevant notifications

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Extracted from US6 as a distinct testable capability not covered by other FRs. Should-Have based on Medium priority in source.

functional_requirements.title: User Notification Preferences
functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to control notification preferences including always-on push notifications versus in-app only delivery

citation.source_reference: Allow users to control notification preferences (always-on vs. app-open only)

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Distinct from FR-02 (location tracking control). This is about notification delivery channel preference. Must-Have as it's listed as a key decision.

functional_requirements.title: User Registration and Authentication
functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to create an account and authenticate to access personalized features, offer history, and privacy settings

citation.source_reference: Given a user is logged in, When They navigate to the offer history screen

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: AC4 implies authentication exists ('logged in'). Multiple features depend on user identity. Must-Have as it's a prerequisite for core functionality.

functional_requirements.title: Merchant Registration and Onboarding
functional_requirements.description: Merchants must be able to register on the platform and undergo a quality review process before their campaigns go live

citation.source_reference: Merchant onboarding subject to quality review

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Implied by the constraint that merchants must be onboarded with quality review. Must-Have as merchant participation is core to the platform.

functional_requirements.title: Merchant Campaign Management
functional_requirements.description: Merchants must be able to create, configure, and manage offer campaigns including setting geofence areas, offer hours, and target audience parameters

citation.source_reference: 10,000 simultaneous merchant campaigns

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: The platform must support 10,000 campaigns — implying merchants can create and manage them. Must-Have as offers cannot exist without campaign management.

functional_requirements.title: Payment Provider Integration
functional_requirements.description: The system must integrate with payment providers to securely access and analyze user transaction history for offer personalization

citation.source_reference: Integrate with payment providers to analyze transaction history securely

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Key architectural decision and dependency. Must-Have as FR-03 (personalization) depends on this integration.

functional_requirements.title: User Consent Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must implement transparent consent flows for location tracking and transaction data access, collecting explicit user consent before accessing any personal data

citation.source_reference: User consent required for location and transaction data access

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Regulatory requirement (GDPR/CCPA) and explicit constraint. Must-Have for compliance. Mitigation strategy also mentions 'Transparent consent flows'.

functional_requirements.title: Geofence Zone Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must support creation, modification, and deletion of geofence zones associated with merchant locations, including defining radius/polygon boundaries and active hours

citation.source_reference: Develop a mobile app that integrates geofencing, behavioral analytics, and transaction data to deliver targeted, real-time offers

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Geofencing is the core delivery mechanism. FR-01 describes delivery but not the management of geofence zones themselves. Without this, offers cannot be spatially targeted. Must-Have as prerequisite to FR-01.

functional_requirements.title: In-App Offer Feed
functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to browse available offers within the app, filtered by proximity, category, and relevance, without relying solely on push notifications

citation.source_reference: Offers are delivered via push notifications or in-app, with seamless redemption at partner merchants

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Source explicitly states 'or in-app' as a delivery channel alongside push. Users who disable push or have notification preferences set to in-app-only need a browsable offer feed. Must-Have as it's a stated delivery channel.

functional_requirements.title: Offer Expiry and Lifecycle Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must automatically expire offers based on their validity period, remove expired offers from user views, and prevent redemption of expired offers

citation.source_reference: As a User, Report an expired or invalid offer

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: US8 and AC6 reference expired offers, implying offers have lifecycles. Without automatic expiry management, users would constantly encounter stale offers. Must-Have for data integrity and UX.

functional_requirements.title: User Profile and Preference Management
functional_requirements.description: Users must be able to view and update their profile information and set spending category preferences to improve offer relevance

citation.source_reference: The offer matches the user's preferences and transaction history

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: AC1 references 'user's preferences' as a matching criterion. Users need a way to set/update these preferences. Should-Have as transaction history can bootstrap personalization without explicit preferences.

functional_requirements.title: Offer Content Creation by Merchants
functional_requirements.description: Merchants must be able to create offer content including title, description, terms and conditions, images, discount value, validity period, and redemption limits

citation.source_reference: Partner with merchants for exclusive, redeemable offers

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: Offers must be created before they can be delivered. FR-18 covers campaign management (targeting, scheduling) but not the offer content itself. Must-Have as the platform cannot function without offer content.

functional_requirements.title: Geofence Entry/Exit Event Detection
functional_requirements.description: The system must detect when a user enters or exits a geofenced area and trigger the offer matching pipeline within the 2-second delivery window

citation.source_reference: A user with location tracking enabled enters a geofenced area during merchant offer hours, When The user is detected within the geofence

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: AC1 explicitly describes geofence entry detection as the trigger. This is the event-driven mechanism that connects location to offer delivery. Distinct from FR-21 (zone management) and FR-01 (delivery). Must-Have as the triggering mechanism.

functional_requirements.title: Duplicate Redemption Prevention
functional_requirements.description: The system must prevent users from redeeming the same offer more than once, displaying clear status when an offer has already been redeemed

citation.source_reference: Tracks savings and avoids duplicate redemptions

trajectory.detail: Fetched PSD2 SEPA payment rules
Applied SCA requirements to acceptance criteria
Produced story in As a/I want/So that format

functional_requirements.reasoning: US4 explicitly mentions avoiding duplicate redemptions. Without this, merchants face financial loss from multi-use of single-use offers. Must-Have for platform integrity.

non_functional_requirements.title: Offer Notification Delivery Latency
non_functional_requirements.description: Offer notifications must be delivered within 2 seconds of a qualifying geofence event

citation.source_reference: Offer notifications must be delivered within 2 seconds of a qualifying event (e.g., entering a geofenced area)

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit measurable target provided. Must-Have from 'must' language. Also a KPI target.

non_functional_requirements.title: App Screen Load Time
non_functional_requirements.description: App screens must load within 1 second on devices from the last 3 years

citation.source_reference: App screens must load within 1 second on devices from the last 3 years

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit measurable target with device scope defined. Must-Have from 'must' language.

non_functional_requirements.title: Data Encryption in Transit and at Rest
non_functional_requirements.description: All user data must be encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256 or equivalent)

citation.source_reference: All user data must be encrypted in transit and at rest

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit security requirement. Must-Have from 'must' language. Encryption standards inferred from industry best practice.

non_functional_requirements.title: GDPR Compliance
non_functional_requirements.description: The system must comply with GDPR for data privacy, user consent, right to erasure, and data portability

citation.source_reference: The app must comply with GDPR and CCPA for data privacy and user consent

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit regulatory requirement. Split from CCPA as they are distinct regulations with different obligations. Must-Have as regulatory compliance is mandatory.

non_functional_requirements.title: CCPA Compliance
non_functional_requirements.description: The system must comply with CCPA for California consumer data privacy rights including right to know, delete, and opt-out of sale

citation.source_reference: The app must comply with GDPR and CCPA for data privacy and user consent

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit regulatory requirement. Split from GDPR as a separate compliance obligation. Must-Have as regulatory compliance is mandatory.

non_functional_requirements.title: Concurrent User Capacity
non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must support at least 1 million concurrent users without performance degradation

citation.source_reference: The platform must support at least 1 million concurrent users and 10,000 simultaneous merchant campaigns without degradation

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit scalability target. Split from campaign capacity as they are independently testable. Must-Have from 'must' language.

non_functional_requirements.title: Simultaneous Campaign Capacity
non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must support at least 10,000 simultaneous merchant campaigns without performance degradation

citation.source_reference: The platform must support at least 1 million concurrent users and 10,000 simultaneous merchant campaigns without degradation

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit scalability target for merchant side. Split from user capacity. Must-Have from 'must' language.

non_functional_requirements.title: WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
non_functional_requirements.description: The app must meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards including support for screen readers, high-contrast modes, and adjustable font sizes

citation.source_reference: The app must meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards, including support for screen readers, high-contrast modes, and adjustable font sizes

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit accessibility standard with specific features listed. Must-Have from 'must' language. Maps to AC8.

non_functional_requirements.title: System Uptime
non_functional_requirements.description: The system must maintain 99.9% uptime with automated failover and recovery for critical services

citation.source_reference: The system must maintain 99.9% uptime, with automated failover and recovery for critical services

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Explicit availability target with recovery mechanism specified. Must-Have from 'must' language.

non_functional_requirements.title: Battery Efficiency
non_functional_requirements.description: Geofencing logic must be optimized to minimize battery drain from continuous location tracking

citation.source_reference: Battery drain from continuous location tracking - Mitigation: Optimize geofencing logic, allow user control over tracking frequency

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Identified as a medium-likelihood risk with explicit mitigation strategy. Should-Have as it's a mitigation rather than a hard requirement. No specific target defined — flagged in gaps.

non_functional_requirements.title: Geofence Event Processing Throughput
non_functional_requirements.description: The system must process geofence entry/exit events at a rate sufficient to serve 1 million concurrent users, each potentially triggering multiple geofence events per hour, without exceeding the 2-second delivery SLA

citation.source_reference: The platform must support at least 1 million concurrent users... Offer notifications must be delivered within 2 seconds

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: Combining NFR-01 (2s latency) with NFR-06 (1M users) implies a massive event processing throughput requirement. This is a distinct scalability concern from user connections or campaign count.

non_functional_requirements.title: Location Data Minimization
non_functional_requirements.description: The system must implement data minimization principles — collecting only the location precision necessary for geofence matching and not storing continuous location trails

citation.source_reference: The app must comply with GDPR... Utilize real-time location tracking with user consent for precise offer delivery
citation.source_location: Non-Functional Requirements - Security; Proposed Solution - Key Decisions

non_functional_requirements.reasoning: GDPR Article 5(1)(c) requires data minimization. Continuous location storage would be disproportionate to the purpose of offer delivery. Must-Have for GDPR compliance.
